headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Match Group, Raises Price Target to $41
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ken Gawrelski   maintains Match Group (NASDAQ:MTCH) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $38 to $41.
